mapper.sql: id, counselor_user_id, date, start_time, end_time, status, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM schedule_slot WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO schedule_slot (counselor_user_id, date, start_time, end_time, status, deleted) VALUES
(#{slot.counselorUserId}, #{slot.date}, #{slot.startTime}, #{slot.endTime}, #{slot.status}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule_slot SET status = #{targetStatus}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{currentStatus} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE schedule_slot SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE schedule_slot SET start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
